original: IT IS HEREBY ORDERED AND ADJUDGED that the defendant shall forthwith pay
issues: Does not begin with a prepositional phrase
Only one noun — minimal fact content
No gerund (-ING) verbs — not in now-time
Contains modal/future verbs (SHALL, WILL, etc. = fiction)
Null adverb-verb chain(s) detected: IS HEREBY ORDERED; shall forthwith pay
corrections: Begin sentence with a valid preposition: FOR, BY, OF, WITH, IN, AGAINST
Add additional nouns to establish complete facts
Convert verbs to gerund form (-ING) for now-time validity
Remove past tense markers (-ED, WAS, WERE, HAD); use gerund form
Remove modal verbs; state facts in now-time gerund form
Remove adverb-verb chains; replace with noun-fact constructions
Replace all pronouns with actual nouns/names
Ensure sentence has prepositional grounding and noun anchors
